architectReview.evidence: agent://122-G004ArchitectUltimate reviewed G004 after final fixes and found CLEAR architecture/product/code: manual product_url/image_url/source wiring, deterministic bounded import, protocol restrictions, no scraping/crawling claim, and SSRF protections including IPv6 special-use handling. agent://121-G004CleanupUltimate produced AI SLOP CLEANUP REPORT with zero blockers and zero advisories.

executorQa.evidence: agent://123-G004QaUltimate passed final read-only QA/red-team matrix. Leader-run verification after the final IPv6 fix passed: focused products/P4 tests (2 files, 36 tests), Biome check on G004 files, typecheck, full npm test (10 files, 139 tests), and Prisma validate. Evidence artifact: artifacts/g004-product-completion-test-report.json.

artifactRefs.description: Final G004 API/package contract and security test report with command artifact references.

contractCoverage.obligation: Manual create/edit carries product_url, image_url, and source; blank optional fields are omitted; existing edit metadata is seeded and PATCHed.
Import derives metadata only from bounded URL/path/query fields, rejects metadata-poor imports, and never fetches or scrapes remote content.

Import URL is bounded, HTTPS-only, Naver-host allowlisted, DNS-checked, and rejects private/reserved IPv4 plus IPv6 special-use/link-local/multicast/documentation/translation/6to4/IPv4-mapped private ranges.

contractCoverage.contractRef: G004 URL protocol and UI copy
contractCoverage.obligation: Manual product_url permits only http/https/manual, image_url permits only http/https, imported image URL is syntactically validated, and UI copy does not claim crawling.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: Static package/API inspection plus npm test -- tests/products-screen-contract.test.ts tests/p4-contract.test.ts
Static ProductEditPanel/ProductManager/service inspection plus focused product tests
parseNaverProductFromUrl exercised by tests/p4-contract.test.ts via npm test -- tests/products-screen-contract.test.ts tests/p4-contract.test.ts
isPrivateAddress and validateProductImportUrl source contract covered by tests/products-screen-contract.test.ts and tests/p4-contract.test.ts
products-screen contract asserts URL information copy and absence of 자동 크롤링 in product UI/status source

adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Blank optional fields are omitted and createProduct defaults product_url/source to manual://product/manual.

adversarialCases.scenario: Existing product edit with product_url/image_url/source already populated.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Edit form seeds and PATCHes all three metadata fields without dropping them.

adversarialCases.scenario: Metadata-poor Naver URL without product query/path metadata.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Import throws PRODUCT_IMPORT_BLOCKED:missing_product_metadata and creates no generic fallback product.
Imported product/category text is truncated to schema bounds and import URL length is capped.

adversarialCases.scenario: Attempted network scraping or HTML parser enrichment.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Product import service contains no fetch/axios/cheerio/jsdom scraping path and uses deterministic URL metadata only.
Loopback, unspecified, ULA, fe80::/10, multicast, NAT64, discard-only, 2001::/23, 2001:db8::/32, 2002::/16, 3fff::/20, and IPv4-mapped private addresses are blocked while public IPv6 is not.

adversarialCases.scenario: IPv4-mapped private IPv6 address such as ::ffff:127.0.0.1.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Mapped private address delegates to IPv4 classifier and is blocked.

adversarialCases.scenario: javascript: in manual product_url or image_url, or invalid imported thumbnail.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Manual unsafe schemes are rejected; invalid imported image metadata is omitted.

adversarialCases.scenario: Product import UI copy implies crawling/scraping.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: UI/status text says URL information import and tests assert 자동 크롤링 is absent.

iteration.evidence: AI SLOP CLEANUP REPORT agent://121-G004CleanupUltimate is CLEAR/APPROVE with zero blockers/advisories. Earlier cleanup blockers were fixed and full loop was rerun cleanly. Final leader verification passed focused products/P4 tests, Biome check, typecheck, full npm test, and Prisma validate after the latest IPv6 fix.
